findings.description: Full-page image of the source document is rendered alongside the extracted text, causing massive content duplication.
findings.evidence: The HTML version displays a full-scale image of the entire PDF page at the top, followed by the semantic HTML text extraction of the same content.

findings.description: Multi-column header layout is collapsed into a single column in the semantic text.
findings.evidence: In the HTML text section, the multi-column header (Governor names on left, Department info on right) is rendered as a single left-aligned block.

findings.description: Header seal and footer logos are missing from the semantic text flow.
findings.evidence: The NC state seal at the top and the DEQ logo at the bottom are missing from the extracted HTML text version.

findings.description: Reading order is severely disrupted by an injected full-page image.
findings.evidence: A full-page raster image of PDF Page 2 is inserted directly into the document flow, interrupting the text continuing from Page 1 and forcing the user to encounter the page content twice.

findings.description: Reading order is severely disrupted by an injected full-page image.
findings.evidence: A full-page raster image of PDF Page 3 is inserted directly into the HTML document flow, interleaving with and interrupting the semantic text.

findings.description: Reading order is severely disrupted by an injected full-page image.
findings.evidence: A full-page raster image of PDF Page 4 is inserted directly into the HTML document flow, interleaving with and interrupting the semantic text.

findings.description: Missing handwritten signature in the semantic text.
findings.evidence: The blue handwritten signature for Judith A. Wehner is present in the PDF but completely missing from the extracted HTML text section.
